app.script:
df <- subset(get.input(), !is.na(mass_kg))
df$force_N <- df$mass_kg * 9.8
df$extension_mean_m <- rowMeans(df[c("extension_1_m", "extension_2_m", "extension_3_m")], na.rm = TRUE)
df$extension_sd_m <- apply(df[c("extension_1_m", "extension_2_m", "extension_3_m")], 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
fit <- lm(force_N ~ 0 + extension_mean_m, data = df)
theme <- get.graph.settings()
plot(df$extension_mean_m, df$force_N,
  pch = 19, col = theme$accent, cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "mean extension_m", ylab = "force_N",
  main = "Hooke's Law"
)
arrows(df$extension_mean_m - df$extension_sd_m, df$force_N,
  df$extension_mean_m + df$extension_sd_m, df$force_N,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(a = 0, b = coef(fit)[1], col = theme$fg, lwd = 2)
print(df[c("mass_kg", "extension_mean_m", "extension_sd_m", "force_N")])
cat(sprintf("Estimated spring constant: %.1f N/m\n", coef(fit)[1]))

ui.sheetStatus: フックの法則サンプル

runtimeStatus.text: サンプルを読み込みました
